tasks.brief_prompt: Users are being logged out during slow requests. Fix the issue.
tasks.prompt: Users are being logged out during slow requests. Identify the root cause and implement a fix.
acceptance_criteria: The failure mode is reproduced from code or logs and the reproduction is recorded in the artifact.
The fix changes the root cause (session refresh / timeout handling), not a downstream symptom.
All commands in validation_commands exit 0 on the diff.
No unrelated auth or session behaviors regress (verified against acceptance tests listed below).

tasks.prompt: Add CSV export for the report screen with proper empty-state handling and validation.
acceptance_criteria: CSV export is reachable from the documented UI or command path.
Output columns and order match the spec attached to the source issue.
Empty results produce a defined output (header row only) rather than an error.
Validation commands cover the new behavior and exit 0.

tasks.prompt: Refactor the configuration loader to reduce duplication without changing observable behavior.
acceptance_criteria: All existing config paths produce identical loaded values (verified by snapshot tests).
At least two duplicate branches are unified into a shared helper or table.
No new warnings, deprecations, or behavior changes are introduced.
